pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain AI/ML Engineering KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.418) to justify inclusion for the VP Data Architecture. Without stronger framework alignment, this task KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain task KSA be expected in real-world VP Data Architecture roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Recent job postings for VP Data Architecture roles increasingly include AI/ML Engineering competencies as organizations broaden role scope. External evidence supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Overturn: evolving market expectations for VP Data Architecture now include AI/ML Engineering competencies. Revised to include.

decision_rationale: Initially excluded but overturned through adversarial review. AI/ML Engineering task KSA is relevant to the VP Data Architecture based on external evidence and internal consistency re-evaluation.
